name: Americans For Prosperity
subject: TOMORROW @ the Supreme Court!
body:
---
| |
---
| | | | |
---
| | [](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=75a9577cbe34089b98bfeb3c702bafd4a5a3eb326ee45138e0297c06938d2680597e7f1c4e66ce7d)
---
| | Tomorrow, Monday, January 11th, the U.S. Supreme Court will hear a landmark case for the First Amendment, and we want YOU to be there, Peter!

Join us from 9am-1pm at the Supreme Court, 1 First Street NE, Washington, D.C. [Click here to let us know you're coming.](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=75a9577cbe34089b211e49686fb3fb11a718d405e17c181588e6c531d3c21d2f670d31b25e6b2740 "Click here to let us know you're coming.") **We don't want friends of big government to be the only ones turning out!** If the Court rules for the plaintiffs in _Friedrichs v. California Teachers Association_ , they could end mandatory union dues in the public sector...essentially enacting right-to-work for every public school teacher and government employee in America, preserving their First Amendment freedom of speech. **We want YOU to be there to support the courageous plaintiffs: Rebecca Friedrichs and her fellow teachers who wish to be freed from forced union dues.** [Join us](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=75a9577cbe34089b5a10d36453a00fa30cef222c30fdea1a9c9da879c34a300fd77f4292aa342bae "Join us") in support of worker freedom and the First Amendment on the steps of the U.S. Supreme Court, 1 First Street NE, Washington, D.C. from 9am-1pm on Monday, January 11th. See you there! Akash Chougule
Deputy Director of Policy
Americans for Prosperity

PS: If you can't make it in person, show your support on Twitter using #IStandWithRebecca!

---
| |

This email was sent to: **dpwillis67@gmail.com **
We respect your right to privacy - [**view our policy**](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=75a9577cbe34089b1a6b61ad0f45a32adaeb6f161b41c421bce6b01baf835d8f54789945844301d6) Americans For Prosperity 1310 N. Courthouse Road, Suite 700 Arlington, VA 22201 ******[Update Profile and Subscription Preferences](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=75a9577cbe34089bb62c5035ac66b2089082565a4749ea2e65e63ee1d035b884fe2ded4439fd8338) | [One-Click Unsubscribe](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=75a9577cbe34089bdfec60d6dbb9ea1c36f41224f606c05b8a46b94934a100c995c1fd5eee338780)******
---
clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | | Tomorrow, Monday, January 11th, the U.S. Supreme Court will hear a landmark case for the First Amendment, and we want YOU to be there, Peter! Join us from 9am-1pm at the Supreme Court, 1 First Street NE, Washington, D.C. "Click here to let us know you're coming." We don't want friends of big government to be the only ones turning out! If the Court rules for the plaintiffs in Friedrichs v. California Teachers Association , they could end mandatory union dues in the public sector...essentially enacting right-to-work for every public school teacher and government employee in America, preserving their First Amendment freedom of speech. We want YOU to be there to support the courageous plaintiffs: Rebecca Friedrichs and her fellow teachers who wish to be freed from forced union dues. "Join us" in support of worker freedom and the First Amendment on the steps of the U.S. Supreme Court, 1 First Street NE, Washington, D.C. from 9am-1pm on Monday, January 11th. See you there! Akash Chougule Deputy Director of Policy Americans for Prosperity PS: If you can't make it in person, show your support on Twitter using #IStandWithRebecca! | |

name: Ron Paul
subject: URGENT: We're only days away
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Dear Patriot,

The Senate vote on Audit the Fed is a huge
moment for all of us.

I put together a video for you that explains
exactly how important a strong fundraising outcome will be to
Rand's Audit the Fed vote that we've been working years to
secure. You should watch.

We need your help TODAY.

We know that the Fed will go on the defense
to destroy Rand. That's because he's the only one that threatens
their authority.

No other candidate is as dedicated to
exposing the corruption and ending the Washington machine.

The Federal Reserve will do anything they can
to maintain their unconstitutional authority. But they can't
fight us off forever. And they know it.

The Liberty movement rallying around Rand is
their worst nightmare.

Don't you want to prove why it should be?

A strong fundraising month can prove this
movement is rallied around a strong leader for Liberty.

You can bet the Federal Reserve will be
looking to the campaign to prove strength -- and the Senators
that have to vote on Audit the Fed on January 12th? They'll be
looking too.

This is our last chance to take a stand and
show them all how much we Stand with Rand.

We're only DAYS away from the vote!

Please, contribute as generously as you can
today.

In liberty,
Ron Paul

GIVE $25 TODAY >>

GIVE $50 TODAY >>

GIVE $75 TODAY >>

GIVE $100 TODAY >>

Or donate another
amount >>

Paid for by Rand Paul for President

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system April 16, 2015.

name: Team Katie
subject: "top race"
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate |
body:
Friend --

All the pundits agree: Pennsylvania's Senate race is one of 2016's most important.

Politico: Pennsylvania race "will decide Senate control"
1/6/16

Associated Press: "Beating Toomey will be of the utmost importance for Democrats to retake control of the Senate"
1/3/16

Roll Call: PA Senate is a "top race"
12/29/15

Katie needs your help to win this critical seat. Donate today:

name: Rand Paul
subject: Just days away
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Dear Patriot,

The fight is on.

Just days from now, the United States Senate
will finally vote on my Audit the Fed Bill.

I know Fed lobbyists are already beginning to
turn up the heat on key swing votes in the U.S. Senate.

They're determined to keep the Fed's
secretive inner-workings off limits to the American people.

Patriot, it's time to prove to every member
of the U.S. Senate that what polls say on this issue is 100%
true. Eight out of ten Americans support auditing the Fed.

And if my colleagues choose to vote against
it, they do so at their own peril.

If you stand with me, please agree to your
most generous contribution of $50, $25 or even $10 right away.

With your help, my Audit the Fed Bill will
expose the Federal Reserve's:

*** Aiding and abetting big spending
politicians in Congress by simply printing more money to pay the
bills - destroying the dollar and driving the costs of
necessities sky-high - when all of Washington, D.C.'s taxes and
borrowing still don't make ends meet;

*** Corruption and cronyism and the
incredible power the unelected financiers wield over our economy;

*** Interest-rate manipulation, "Quantitative
Easing," and secret bailouts, which instead just paper over our
economic problems and lead to worse economic conditions.

I believe we simply cannot allow this
secretive institution to wield so much power over the American
economy while operating virtually no oversight of many of its
most critical and impactful decisions.

It's time the Federal Reserve was exposed.

It's time we brought their print-now,
ask-questions-later polices to an end.

But time is running out.

I'm counting on you to help me create a tidal
wave of support for my Audit the Fed Bill.

So please agree to your most generous
contribution of $50, $25 or even $10 IMMEDIATELY.

In liberty,
Rand Paul

Chip in $25 >>

Chip in $50 >>

Chip in $75 >>

Chip in $100 >>

Or donate another
amount >>

Paid for by Rand Paul for President

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system April 16, 2015.

name: John Santorum
subject: Friend, Charleston?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Santorum for President 2016 This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail
body:
| Friend,

**Last chance!** Tonight is the deadline to enter to join Daniel, my dad (Rick Santorum), and me in Charleston, South Carolina for the next Republican Debate.
Dad will make a powerful case to this nation for defeating ISIS, strengthening the American family, and bringing jobs back for the American worker. He's the conservative in this race, who has a record of success, and, I believe, is the serious leader we need for these serious times. _**Best of all, the debate will be in the city that I've called home for the last four years -- Charleston, South Carolina.**_ Friend, would you and a friend like to join us in Charleston, South Carolina as our personal guest for the debate? Your flight, hotel, and a pair of tickets are on us, and all you need to do is enter the sweepstakes to be eligible.
[****Your donation of $20.16 or more will automatically enter you win!****](http://www.ricksantorum.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fcauses.anedot.com%2Fcharleston-debate%3Fsc%3Djohn_debate&e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=john_debate&n=1) I hope to meet you and show you around Charleston. [Enter Here with your support of $20.16 or more!](http://www.ricksantorum.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fcauses.anedot.com%2Fcharleston-debate%3Fsc%3Djohn_debate&e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=john_debate&n=2) Respectfully, Cadet John Santorum _**_**P.S. Remember, Dan and I are offering you a personal tour of The Citadel in addition to special access to the debate!**_ **_

> NO PURCHASE NECESSARY TO ENTER OR WIN THIS PROMOTION. No contribution of any kind is necessary to enter or win this Promotion. Making a contribution does not increase your chances or odds of winning. Odds of winning depend on the number of entries received. The Promotion is open to citizens and permanent residents (green card holders) of the United States and are at least 18 years of age or the age of majority as determined by state law. Void where prohibited. All applicable federal, state, and local laws and regulations apply. Please [click here](http://www.ricksantorum.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fcauses.anedot.com%2Fcharleston-debate%3Fsc%3Ddaniel_debate&e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=john_debate&n=3) to enter by making a contribution of $20.16. Please [click here](http://www.ricksantorum.com/debate_contest?e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=john_debate&n=4) to enter without making a contribution. You must complete and submit the online entry form during the contest period. This Promotion begins on Wednesday, January 6, 2016 at 12:00 p.m. Eastern Standard Time and ends on Sunday, January 10, 2016 at 11:59pm Eastern Standard Time (“Entry Period”). All entries must be received by11:59pm Eastern Standard Time on Sunday, January 10, 2016. One winner will receive the following Prize: two tickets to the Republican Presidential Primary Debate in Charleston, SC on January 14, 2016; a $600 travel stipend for travel to Charleston, South Carolina for the winner and one guest, with an approximate retail value of $600; and hotel accommodations for the winner and a guest, with an approximate retail value of $250. Prize may not be substituted or exchanged and is not redeemable for cash. All federal, state, and local taxes associated with the receipt or use of any prize awarded are the sole responsibility of the winner. The Sponsor of this Promotion is Santorum For President 2016, PO Box 247 Verona, PA 15147.

---
Paid for by Santorum for President 2016 This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). This campaign is powered by grassroots supporters like you, so if you have any thoughts on anything at all, [click here](http://www.ricksantorum.com/contact?e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=john_debate&n=5) and let us know. We believe that email is one of the best ways to stay in touch with our supporters, but you can [click here if you would like to unsubscribe](http://www.ricksantorum.com/unsubscribe?e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=john_debate&n=6) from these messages.

If you’re not interested in continuing to receive email updates, there are other ways to stay involved. You can follow our campaign on [Facebook](http://www.ricksantorum.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Ffacebook.com%2Fricksantorum&e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=john_debate&n=7), [Twitter](http://www.ricksantorum.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2Fricksantorum&e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=john_debate&n=8), or [Instagram](http://www.ricksantorum.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Finstagram.com%2Fricksantorum&e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=john_debate&n=9).

**Thank you so much for everything you’re doing to help us reclaim the American Dream for hardworking families.**

Santorum for President 2016, PO Box 238, Verona, PA 15147

[Privacy Policy](http://www.ricksantorum.com/privacy?e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=john_debate&n=10)

name: Jeb Bush
subject: RE: New Hampshire poll just released
body:
Friend -- did you see the news?

**We 're in 2nd place in New Hampshire -- ahead of Marco Rubio, Chris Christie, John Kasich and even Ted Cruz.**

This our chance. You've been waiting for the moment, and this is it. The bad news is, we're still short of our $100,000 goal to capitalize on this. If we don't hit that goal in the next 24 hours, it'll be a huge setback, and we'll have missed our chance.

[**That 's why I'm asking you directly, Friend. Please contribute just $1 right now.**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/mypgmtpvsdnlwjwcltkgslzjpplzvjmvgtbtnvjybbsb_bqcggbzd.html)

**With only 22 days until the Iowa Caucuses, and 30 days until the New Hampshire Primary, this is when I 'm counting on you the most. Can I count on you to contribute just $1 right now?**

[**Jeb2016.com/Stand-With-Jeb/**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/bfbkvjzmbqgydndpyjtkbysnzzysmnvmkjcjgmnfccbb_bqcggbzd.html)

Onward,

Jeb

[](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/uwpbvgckmfnsyjyhsgdbmszjccszkjvkbgpgnkjwppmc_bqcggbzd.html)

**-- Begin Forwarded Message--
From: Team Jeb
Date: January 09, 2015
Subject: New Hampshire poll just released**
**BREAKING: Breitbart: Bush in 2nd as Rubio Fades**
Friend --

**Last night a new poll was released showing Jeb in 2nd place in New Hampshire. That 's right, he's beating Marco Rubio, Chris Christie, John Kasich and even Ted Cruz.**

Jeb is surging just at the right moment with only 23 days until voting starts and 31 days until the New Hampshire Primary, but unless we can raise $100,000 in the next 48 hours, we could lose this momentum.

[**Please, Friend, we need all hands on deck for this. C******ontribute just $1 right now to help us hit this goal.****](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/qmgqyvdrhfgtncnmtvbqhtjcddtjrcyrqvpvgrcsppdn_bqcggbzd.html)

Our opponents are preparing to spend millions in the coming weeks on TV, radio and online ads misinforming voters about the Governor's conservative record, so this cannot wait.

Every day you don't help us fight back is a day that more false attacks will go unanswered.

****That 's why it's so important for us to hit this $100,000 goal in the next 48 hours. Show Jeb you have his back and you're committed to victory by c**ontributing just $1** right now:****

**[**Jeb2016.com/Stand-With-Jeb/**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/hvsrjsfpmwczndnvzsgrmzldffzlpdjprshscpdbhhfv_bqcggbzd.html)**

Thank you,

Team Jeb
** **

**[](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/otjgskqnmlwdfpftdkvgmdcpqqdcnpsngkrkwnpjrrqz_bqcggbzd.html)**
Paid for by Jeb 2016, Inc.
Jeb 2016, Inc. PO Box 440641 Miami, FL 33144
[Unsubscribe](http://www.email.jeb2016.com/Unsub.do?a=u&e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&mid=7340&sid=DB49C865-0E01-4FD8-AE99-ACEBCD4745CE&rid=55890&lid=18)

That 's right, he's beating Marco Rubio, Chris Christie, John Kasich and even Ted Cruz. Jeb is surging just at the right moment with only 23 days until voting starts and 31 days until the New Hampshire Primary, but unless we can raise $100,000 in the next 48 hours, we could lose this momentum. Our opponents are preparing to spend millions in the coming weeks on TV, radio and online ads misinforming voters about the Governor's conservative record, so this cannot wait. Every day you don't help us fight back is a day that more false attacks will go unanswered. **That 's why it's so important for us to hit this $100,000 goal in the next 48 hours. Show Jeb you have his back and you're committed to victory by contributing just $1 right now: Thank you, Team Jeb ** Paid for by Jeb 2016, Inc. Jeb 2016, Inc. PO Box 440641 Miami, FL 33144

name: Melissa Gallahan, Hillary for Virginia
subject: Vote on the Hillary for Virginia logo!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a campaign supported by hundreds of thousands of grassroots donors
body:
We want your help kicking off Hillary for Virginia | Friend --

The Virginia primary will be here before you know it -- I'm excited to start building our team and make sure Hillary wins here in the Old Dominion.

Our first order of business is to pick an official state logo that reflects the best of what Virginia has to offer, and we want you to weigh in!

**[Click here to vote on the design you like the best.](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjQ0MzE3NDUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzIxMTU5ODcyS0&mt=1&rt=0)**

Once you vote, you will be a founding member of our Hillary for Virginia team. I can't wait to work together and to proudly display our team logo as we get our friends, family, and neighbors excited about Hillary.

**Vote for your favorite right now, and join our team:** | [ | [**Cast my vote**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjQ0MzE3NDUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzIxMTU5ODcyS0&mt=1&rt=0)
--- ](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjQ0MzE3NDUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzIxMTU5ODcyS0&mt=1&rt=0)

Thanks,

Melissa

Melissa Gallahan
Virginia Organizing Lead
Hillary for America

| Paid for by Hillary for America, a campaign supported by hundreds of thousands of grassroots donors.
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=24&ms=MjQ0MzE3NDUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzIxMTU5ODcyS0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! If you'd like more information on key policies, visit [hillaryclinton.com/issues](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjQ0MzE3NDUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzIxMTU5ODcyS0&mt=1&rt=0). Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=MjQ0MzE3NDUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzIxMTU5ODcyS0&mt=1&rt=0) to receive less email and click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjQ0MzE3NDUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzIxMTU5ODcyS0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjQ0MzE3NDUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzIxMTU5ODcyS0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjQ0MzE3NDUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzIxMTU5ODcyS0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=21&ms=MjQ0MzE3NDUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzIxMTU5ODcyS0&mt=1&rt=0). Puedes encontrar más información sobre la campaña de Hillary en español [aquí](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=25&ms=MjQ0MzE3NDUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzIxMTU5ODcyS0&mt=1&rt=0). If you're still reading this, you must be a really dedicated Hillary supporter. [Yee-haw for you](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjQ0MzE3NDUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzIxMTU5ODcyS0&mt=1&rt=0)! Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=18&ms=MjQ0MzE3NDUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzIxMTU5ODcyS0&mt=1&rt=0)

name: Chris Christie
subject: This couldn't wait
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Christie for President, Inc
body:
Peter: This couldn't wait, I had to share the news that shows our sustained momentum in New Hampshire is real.
According to the latest NBC/WSJ/Marist New Hampshire poll, our campaign is third -- just within striking distance of second, and even the top spot. This poll shows what your support has helped us achieve.
We need to keep working hard until we get to the top and your support is needed. **[Will you make a donation to our campaign today to help get us to the top? Any donation amount will help and is greatly appreciated](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45746707:6DuNRArN5:m:1:1516426255:B0F4B7934DE319F8F3673BB3F2B3C3C3:r)**.

Together, we can do this.
Chris
****

Sent from my iPhone

****
****
****

---
| |
---|---|---
| | Paid for by Chris Christie for President, Inc.
---

Contributions to Chris Christie for President, Inc. are not tax deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes.

Morristown, NJ 07963
(973) 936-9318

name: BernieSanders.com
subject: We could come up just short
body:
#
Brothers and Sisters,
Can you imagine how you'll feel on the night of the Iowa caucuses if it turns out Bernie comes up just short? After all we've accomplished together against impossible odds ... it'd be devastating.
With your support Bernie has brought us within striking distance of winning. But the new NBC poll released just this morning shows we still have critical ground to make up in Iowa.
**NBC News Poll (Jan. 10, 2016)**
**Clinton:** 48%
**Sanders:** 45%
**[Your $3 contribution to Bernie's campaign could be the difference between victory and defeat for our political revolution. Make one today.](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2b9d/43f17890/445110d3/620f89ff/3189892037/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/our-firewall?refcode=em160110-c")**
By all accounts, Hillary Clinton has dramatically ramped up her fundraising since we announced our record-breaking number of small-dollar, individual contributions. Earlier this week, the Clinton campaign raised almost two million dollars in one day from just three events with millionaires!
But our campaign is funded by emails like these. That's why your contribution today is so important.
In solidarity,
Jeff Weaver
Campaign Manager
Bernie 2016
**[Contribute $3](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2b9d/43f17890/445110d3/620f89ff/3189892037/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/our-firewall?refcode=em160110-c")**

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2b9d/43f17890/445110d3/620f89fc/3189892037/VEsF/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2b9d/43f17890/445110d3/620f89fd/3189892037/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjIwOTAyIn0=/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2b9d/43f17890/445110d3/620f89fa/3189892037/VEsD/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2b9d/43f17890/445110d3/620f89fb/3189892037/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").
